name: Angels of Death
overview: Most girls waking up without any memory and meeting a serial killer would panic, but not Rachel. In fact, far from being her biggest problem, killer Zack might just prove a convenient resource when it comes to finding a way out of the building in which they're both trapped!

trailers.title: Angels of Death [Satsuriku no Tenshi] - Official Teaser (English Subtitles)
